answers: IoT (Internet of Things) = everyday devices connected to internet. Smart home, wearables, industrial sensors, connected cars.
Examples: smart thermostat, fitness tracker, smart fridge, security cameras, connected lights — all sending/receiving data.
IoT components: sensors (collect data), connectivity (WiFi/Bluetooth), processing (cloud/edge), and user interface (app).
Learn IoT: start with Arduino/Raspberry Pi + sensors, connect to cloud (AWS IoT, ThingSpeak), and build simple projects.
